candidate.completion: misdial me; at this point even your pocket deserves a second chance.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please misdial me; at this point even your pocket deserves a second chance.

evaluation.rationale: The pocket-misdial turn is fresh and logically legible, and it lands a recognizable truth about wanting even accidental attention. The phrasing is fairly quotable, but the clause after the semicolon is a touch more elaborate than the sharpest version of the joke.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
